content.full_text:
March 25, 2008

Ben Hueso
1976 Harrison Avenue
San Diego, CA 92113

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-08-043

Dear Mr. Hueso:

This letter is to notify you that we have withdrawn the above captioned request for advice per a telephone conversation on March 24, 2008 during which I learned that your advice request is based on activities that have already occurred. The Commission will not advise with respect to past conduct. (Regulation 18329(b)(8)(A).)

If you have any questions, feel free to call me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
General Counsel

By: Trish Mayer
Political Reform Consultant
